front.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character design sheet, front view, full body, standing idle pose. The character is a Time Guardian — a chronomancer in dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style. They wear a hybrid of robes and light armor decorated with clock gears. Miniature clock towers adorn their shoulder plates. They wield a staff topped with a rotating clock face, and 3-5 floating mini gears hover around their body. Colors: time gold, bronze, silver, with cyan time glow. Art style: 512x512 pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing on borders, 2.5 head-to-body chibi proportions. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. Dark fantasy atmosphere with subtle glowing elements. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
